task_details.delay_risks: Difficulty in identifying and engaging relevant stakeholders, conflicting priorities among coalition members, slow decision-making processes within partner organizations.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Develop a comprehensive stakeholder map, establish clear communication channels and decision-making protocols, offer incentives for participation, and proactively address potential conflicts.

task_details.delay_risks: Lack of interest from key organizations, difficulty in reaching consensus on key policy positions, competing advocacy efforts from other groups.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Conduct thorough research to identify shared interests, tailor messaging to resonate with different stakeholders, offer opportunities for collaboration, and build strong relationships with key decision-makers.

task_details.delay_risks: Difficulty scheduling meetings with Digitaliseringsstyrelsen representatives, lack of responsiveness to inquiries, resistance to proposed changes.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Establish a formal communication channel with Digitaliseringsstyrelsen, prepare clear and concise briefing materials, build relationships with key personnel, and be persistent in following up on requests.
